title: VehicleCategory
description: A broad classification of vehicles by their physical type, such as two-wheeler, three-wheeler, four-wheeler, or bus.

vehicleCategoryCode.description: Code for the vehicle category (e.g. TWO_WHEELER, THREE_WHEELER, FOUR_WHEELER, BUS)

maxPassengers.description: Maximum number of passengers for vehicles in this category

id.description: Unique identifier for the category code

parentCategoryId.description: Identifier of the parent category if hierarchical
